description: Task routing for the agent-context toolchain repo. Defaults map task types to pack read orders; named_patterns name common cross-cutting changes specific to this repo.

lookup.description: Find a specific value, definition, config, or file location

impact_analysis.description: Determine which files must change for a given modification

planning.description: Design a new feature or architectural change

diagnosis.description: Debug an error, investigate a failure, or trace a code path

operations.description: Run tests, deploy, manage migrations, or check CI

steps: Read 30_BEHAVIORAL_INVARIANTS.md → 'Bump CLI version' row of the Update Checklist

Edit bin/agent-context (__version__), SKILL.md (frontmatter metadata.version), skills/agent-context/SKILL.md (frontmatter metadata.version), and README.md (badge URL badge/version-X.Y.Z-...) — all four are test-enforced by tests/test_version_drift.py
Add a RELEASE_NOTES.md entry under the new version heading (convention, not test-enforced)
Run python3 -m unittest tests.test_version_drift — must pass
Tag vX.Y.Z and push (tag triggers .github/workflows/release.yml)

edit_canonical_template.description: Modify a markdown or JSON file under templates/ that ships with the CLI.
steps: Edit templates/<file>
Run scripts/sync-from-canonical.sh to mirror the change into skills/agent-context/templates/<file>
Run python3 -m unittest tests.test_skill_sync tests.test_init_tiers — both must pass
If the change is structurally significant for the verifier, add coverage in tests/test_verify.py and tests/test_verifier_failures.py

add_cli_subcommand.description: Add a new top-level subcommand to bin/agent-context.
steps: Edit bin/agent-context (subparser, handler function)
Update SKILL.md and skills/agent-context/SKILL.md if the subcommand changes the operator/agent flow
Add coverage in tests/test_cli_smoke.py
If user-facing: update README.md CLI section

add_result_schema_field.description: Extend scripts/experiments/result.schema.json with a new field.
steps: Edit scripts/experiments/result.schema.json — add the field with type and description
Edit scripts/experiments/extract-events-from-chorus.py — populate the field from session data
Edit scripts/experiments/extract-events-from-codex.py — populate the field
If the field feeds a metric: add the computation in scripts/experiments/derived-metrics.py
Update tests/test_result_schema.py, tests/test_extract_events.py, tests/test_extract_events_codex.py
Optional: backfill old result JSONs via scripts/experiments/apply-provenance.py

edit_deck.description: Change content or design of the meetup deck. The deck is hand-authored HTML — edit it directly, no Marp build.
steps: Edit talk/cursor-meetup-may-2026.html (canonical, hand-authored HTML+CSS, deep-navy theme)
Refresh GitHub Pages target: cp talk/cursor-meetup-may-2026.html talk/index.html
Re-render PDF: (cd talk && ./render-pdf.sh) — picks up Chrome / Chromium / Edge automatically
Commit all three artifacts together (cursor-meetup-may-2026.html + index.html + cursor-meetup-may-2026.pdf)

add_agent_extractor.description: Wire a new agent's session JSONL into the schema-v3 pipeline.
steps: Create scripts/experiments/extract-events-from-<agent>.py — mirror the chorus/codex shape
Add tests/test_extract_events_<agent>.py — copy the structure of tests/test_extract_events_codex.py
Run python3 -m unittest tests.test_extract_events_<agent>
Touch scripts/experiments/derived-metrics.py only if the agent introduces a metric variant
